title: Alien Showdown: The Day the Old West Stood Still
original_title: Alien Showdown: The Day the Old West Stood Still
overview: An alien scout lands on earth in the year 1854. The creature is searching for water and food. Once it finds what it needs, it will call in an invasion fleet. A lone cowboy must stand against the alien invader or all will be lost.
